title: DarkWooly
description: Get Wool, Terracotta & Concrete from Sheep using a Diamond Sword
body:
Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off!


 

DarkWooly


Get more wool, terracotta & concrete from sheep using a diamond sword! |  View Changelog

Server side is supported. You can install this on the server and not need to have it installed on the client.

Created by the same authors who made DarkRPG (for a full RPG experience, get the DarkRPG modpack and enjoy quests and rpg gameplay)

 

Features

(Your vanilla experience will be further enhanced thanks to these features)

Killing a vanilla sheep gives you wool that corresponds to the color of the sheep

Use a Diamond Sword on a sheep and receive different colored wool. Only seeing white sheep but want other types of wool? no problem! just use a diamond sword on them and get a chance to receive different colored wool.

Use a Diamond Sword on a sheep while it's on fire and receive different colored terracotta.

Use a Diamond Sword on a sheep while it's in water and receive different colored concrete.

Permission - Feel free to use in your modpacks.

Click the banner below to get your server today! or go to BisectHosting.com  and make sure to use the code 'gamerpotion' to get your 25% off.
